missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Statechart fragment shown in Figure 20.12 models the process of logging on to a website which may or may not recognize the user.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall model the process of logging on to a website.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall model the process of logging on to a website.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not supported by the source text, which mentions 'may or may not recognize the user'.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall model the process of logging on to a website.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous because it does not specify what happens if the user is recognized or not.
